evals.prompt: Build me a current Standard budget Mage deck and give me the Hearthstone import code.
evals.expected_output: Uses current card/meta research, produces a legal Mage deck list, and generates a deckstring with the bundled script rather than inventing one.

evals.prompt: I have these Hearthstone card DBF IDs. Turn them into a Wild deck code I can paste into the game: 1:2, 2:2, 3:2, 4:1, hero 7.
evals.expected_output: Runs the script in offline DBF mode and returns a clipboard-ready import block with code AAEBAQcBBAMBAgMAAA==.

evals.prompt: Make a Warrior deck that includes E.T.C. sideboard cards and output the import code.
evals.expected_output: Represents sideboard cards in JSON with an owner and verifies the generated deck code by decoding it.
